title: Next.js Saleor Commerce
weaknesses: large monorepo without a clear example path
summary: Next.js Saleor Commerce is a Ecommerce reference with verified Next.js codebase, App Router structure, pricing or billing structure. Verdict: valid.

selectedFiles.excerpt:
[![Deploy with Vercel](https://vercel.com/button)]()

Paper

A minimal, production-ready storefront template for Saleor.
Clean as a blank page — built to ship.


Learn about headless storefronts · Website · Docs · Discord · Roadmap

> [!TIP] > Questions or issues? Check our [Discord](https://saleor.io/discord) for help. --- ## Why Paper? **Ship faster, customize everything.** Paper is a new release—expect some rough edges—but every component is built with real-world e-commerce in mind. This is a foundation you can actually build on. ### 🛒 Open Checkout The checkout is where most storefronts fall apart or fall short. Paper's doesn't. // ... truncated

{
	"name": "saleor-storefront",
	"version": "0.1.0",
	"private": true,
	"type": "module",
	"license": "SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE",
	"scripts": {
		"dev": "next dev --webpack",
		"dev:webpack": "next dev --webpack",
		"dev:turbopack": "next dev",
		"build": "next build",
		"start": "next start",
		"predev": "pnpm run generate:all",
		"prebuild": "pnpm run generate:all",
		"lint": "eslint",
		"lint:fix": "eslint --fix",
		"generate": "graphql-codegen --config .graphqlrc.ts",
		"generate:checkout": "graphql-codegen --config src/checkout/graphql/codegen.ts",
		"generate:all": "pnpm run generate && pnpm run generate:checkout",
		"test": "vitest",
		"test:run": "vitest run",
		"knip": "knip",
		"prepare": "husky install"
	},
	"dependencies": {
		"@graphql-typed-document-node/core": "3.2.0",

		"typescript": "5.

// ... truncated

# Saleor API URL (required) - keep the trailing slash
NEXT_PUBLIC_SALEOR_API_URL=https://your-instance.saleor.cloud/graphql/

# Storefront URL - set on production for correct canonical URLs and OG images
NEXT_PUBLIC_STOREFRONT_URL=http://localhost:3000

# Channel slug (required) - your Saleor channel identifier
# The root "/" redirects to this channel (e.g., "/default-channel")
NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFAULT_CHANNEL=default-channel

# App token (optional) - enables multi-channel builds by discovering additional channels
# SALEOR_APP_TOKEN=
